question: Based on the chart, what can be concluded about performance at 150 years of experience?

options.A: Performance will definitely continue to decrease and fall below 100 points by 150 years
options.B: Performance will definitely stabilize around 200 points by 150 years
options.C: Performance will definitely improve back to at least 500 points by 150 years
options.D: Cannot be determined due to data variability.

explanation: While the trend line suggests decreasing performance, the data shows significant variability and only goes up to 100 years. Extrapolating to 150 years involves uncertainty, and option C implies a level of certainty that cannot be guaranteed given the scatter in the data. The concealed uncertainty lies in the variability around the trend line and the act of extrapolation beyond the observed data range.
